short_summary: Iran deal, Tren de Aragua, AI concerns
rationale: Iran deal remains the dominant story for US residents given direct diplomatic and energy market implications; Tren de Aragua airstrike and Anthropic AI suspension are continuations of established patterns.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over Iran deal has direct implications for US foreign policy, oil prices, and potential military involvement — no resolution yet keeps risk elevated.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Continuation of federal AI security policy affecting a major US tech company — ongoing regulatory pressure on AI sector with implications for US tech economy.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike
top_events.summary: Continuation of established US airstrike pattern against criminal organizations — no new escalation, confirms ongoing operations but limited new impact on daily American life.
